top_3_revisions: Infrastructure, industrialization and innovation: While I have accepted this domain, it looks too broad and very difficult to analyze. I recall in the past we used to have ACCESS TO SERVICES. Is this towards the same? Likewise, Innovations, are we capturing these at household or at institutioal levels?
strategic_gender_integration_why: Still need to be clear on gender concepts if they mean male or female or they mean the capabilities and opportunities across sex of respondents.
domain_d02_why: In the African context, decent work is a far fetched concept cosidering the informality across all economies. The term DECENT is somehow already biased. My take is that this could only be one of the options of QUALITY OF WORK.
domain_d05_why: What will INCLUSION do? Why dont we focus on Poverty and Inequality only?
domain_d07_why: My take is that HEALTH is adequate. WELL-BEING either falls within health or falls under poverty. Likewise, Universal access is a policy. It is not a domain. It is someting that can be analysed within the health domain.
domain_d08_why: As indicated earlier, this is a cross cutting domain that should be analyzed across sex of respondent
